title: selago brevifolia
intro: Selago brevifolia, also known as Cape pagoda or short-leaved selago, is a succulent plant species native to the southwestern region of South Africa. It possesses medicinal properties, with its extracts exhibiting anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to aid in reducing stress and anxiety, promoting better sleep, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Selago brevifolia, such as teas and tinctures, can be obtained through extraction of its leaves, stems, and roots, and are often used in traditional medicine and holistic practices.
